as_letter.text: เลขที่เอกสาร

as_to.default: ผู้อำนวยการเขตดุสิต

as_book.default: สำนักงานเขตดุสิต ที่ กท 4602/4881
as_book.text: ตามหนังสือ

group_position.default: ข้าราชการกรุงเทพมหานครสามัญ
group_position.text: กลุ่มตำแหน่ง

as_position.default: เจ้าพนักงานธุรการชำนาญงาน

as_department.default: ฝ่ายรักษาความสะอาดและสวนสาธารณะ สำนักงานเขตดุสิต

as_name.default: นางรวีวรรณ ช่อดอก

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,(select count(membership_no) from sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = '!membership_no!' ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) ) as count_mem_coll ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,to_snumber ( pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharestock(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)) as share_stock ,to_snumber ( pka_com_function.fp_lon_get_balance_atdate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,'2',sysdate)) as balance_norn ,to_snumber ( pka_com_function.fp_lon_get_balance_atdate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,'9',sysdate)) as balance_emer ,substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no,0,3)||'-'||substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no,4,6)||'-'||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no as memno ,(select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!sysdate_1!' , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!sysdate_2!' , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate2 ,'!as_to!' as_to ,'!as_book!' as_book ,'!as_position!' as_position ,'!as_department!' as_department ,'!as_letter!' as as_letter ,'!as_name_1!' as as_name ,(select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop ) as coop_name ,'!group_position!' as group_position
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered
where 1=1 /*WHERE*/

r_ktm_book_check_debt_3_nest_coll.sql: select PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no )||' เลขทะเบียน '||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_form (PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_group (sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no),'XXX-XXX')||'-'||sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no as coll from sc_lon_m_contract_coll , sc_lon_m_loan_card where ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.REF_OWN_NO = {0}) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no
